parties.name: ESTATE OF LLOYD R. WILLIAMS, DECEASED

legal_description.value: A portion of the Southwest Quarter of Section 23, Township 2 South, Range 6 East, Gila and Salt River Base and Meridian, Maricopa County, Arizona; containing 40.00 acres more or less. Agricultural use — cotton and alfalfa. (Parent tract of what later becomes SEVILLE PARCEL 3; Lot 46 does not yet exist of record.)

source_note.value: Demo-only instrument. Illustrates the pre-subdivision agricultural ownership of the parent tract that would later be platted as SEVILLE PARCEL 3 (20010093192) in 2001. This distribution deed models a typical Maricopa rural-inheritance pattern of the late 1970s — Gilbert's east side was predominantly cotton and alfalfa farmland until the mid-1990s. The Williams family and estate do not appear in the Maricopa recorder public API; no real instrument by this number exists. Included to extend POPHAM's chain beyond the 2001 plat boundary so the demo shows a full 40-year examiner lookback rather than a 13-year refi slice.

consideration.value: distribution to heirs — no money changed hands

raw_api_response.synthesized_note: Demo-only instrument reconstructing the pre-plat parent-tract ownership under Seville Parcel 3. Illustrates a typical late-1970s Gilbert agricultural inheritance distribution. No real instrument by this recording number exists in publicapi.recorder.maricopa.gov.
